---
title: "13. Machine Learning"
---

# Machine Learning {#sec-ch-13-ml}

Cross-validation, regularisation (ridge/LASSO/elastic net), trees and ensembles, neural networks via `torch`/`keras`, SHAP and other interpretability tools, and the `tidymodels` workflow. False-discovery and knockoff-based selection are treated alongside CV as competing answers to the same question.

This chapter contains **46 method pages** and **8 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.qmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [A Complete mlr3 Workflow](mlr3-workflow.qmd) | `mlr3-workflow` |
| [A Complete tidymodels Workflow](tidymodels-workflow.qmd) | `tidymodels-workflow` |
| [Anomaly Detection](anomaly-detection.qmd) | `anomaly-detection` |
| [Bagging](bagging.qmd) | `bagging` |
| [Calibration Plots](calibration-plots.qmd) | `calibration-plots` |
| [CatBoost](catboost.qmd) | `catboost` |
| [Class Weights for Imbalanced Data](class-weights-imbalanced.qmd) | `class-weights-imbalanced` |
| [Convolutional Neural Networks: Introduction](cnn-introduction.qmd) | `cnn-introduction` |
| [Cross-Validation](cross-validation.qmd) | `cross-validation` |
| [DBSCAN as an ML Tool](clustering-dbscan-ml.qmd) | `clustering-dbscan-ml` |
| [Decision Trees (CART)](decision-trees-cart.qmd) | `decision-trees-cart` |
| [Dropout and Early Stopping](dropout-early-stopping.qmd) | `dropout-early-stopping` |
| [Extremely Randomised Trees](extremely-randomized-trees.qmd) | `extremely-randomized-trees` |
| [Feature Engineering](feature-engineering.qmd) | `feature-engineering` |
| [Feature Selection](feature-selection.qmd) | `feature-selection` |
| [Feedforward Networks in torch](feedforward-networks-torch.qmd) | `feedforward-networks-torch` |
| [Gradient Boosting](gradient-boosting.qmd) | `gradient-boosting` |
| [Isolation Forest](isolation-forest.qmd) | `isolation-forest` |
| [Isotonic Regression Calibration](isotonic-regression.qmd) | `isotonic-regression` |
| [k-Means as an ML Tool](clustering-kmeans-ml.qmd) | `clustering-kmeans-ml` |
| [k-Nearest Neighbours Classification](knn-classification.qmd) | `knn-classification` |
| [k-Nearest Neighbours Regression](knn-regression.qmd) | `knn-regression` |
| [Kernel SVMs](svm-kernel.qmd) | `svm-kernel` |
| [LightGBM](lightgbm.qmd) | `lightgbm` |
| [LIME Explanations](lime-explanations.qmd) | `lime-explanations` |
| [Linear Discriminant as ML](linear-discriminant-ml.qmd) | `linear-discriminant-ml` |
| [Linear Support Vector Machines](svm-linear.qmd) | `svm-linear` |
| [Logistic Regression as ML](logistic-regression-ml.qmd) | `logistic-regression-ml` |
| [Naive Bayes](naive-bayes.qmd) | `naive-bayes` |
| [Nested Cross-Validation](nested-cv.qmd) | `nested-cv` |
| [Neural Networks: Introduction](neural-networks-intro.qmd) | `neural-networks-intro` |
| [Partial Dependence Plots](partial-dependence-plots.qmd) | `partial-dependence-plots` |
| [Platt Scaling](platt-scaling.qmd) | `platt-scaling` |
| [Preprocessing with recipes](recipes-preprocessing.qmd) | `recipes-preprocessing` |
| [Random Forests](random-forest.qmd) | `random-forest` |
| [Regularisation in ML](regularization-ridge-lasso-ml.qmd) | `regularization-ridge-lasso-ml` |
| [RNNs and LSTMs: Introduction](rnn-lstm-intro.qmd) | `rnn-lstm-intro` |
| [SHAP Values](shap-values.qmd) | `shap-values` |
| [SMOTE for Imbalanced Classes](smote-imbalanced.qmd) | `smote-imbalanced` |
| [Stacking Ensembles](stacking-ensembles.qmd) | `stacking-ensembles` |
| [Supervised Learning: Overview](supervised-learning-overview.qmd) | `supervised-learning-overview` |
| [The Bias-Variance Tradeoff](bias-variance-tradeoff.qmd) | `bias-variance-tradeoff` |
| [Train-Test Splits](train-test-split.qmd) | `train-test-split` |
| [Transformers: Overview](transformer-overview.qmd) | `transformer-overview` |
| [Variable Importance](variable-importance.qmd) | `variable-importance` |
| [XGBoost](xgboost.qmd) | `xgboost` |

## Labs

| # | Lab | Course / week / session |
|---|---|---|
| C4.1 | [Week 1, Session 1 â€” Cross-validation, nested CV, bootstrap .632+](labs/lab-cross-validation-nested-cv-bootstrap-632.qmd) | Course 4, week 1, session 1 |
| C4.2 | [Week 1, Session 2 â€” Regularisation: ridge, lasso, elastic net](labs/lab-regularisation-ridge-lasso-elastic-net.qmd) | Course 4, week 1, session 2 |
| C4.6 | [Week 2, Session 1 â€” Trees, random forests, gradient boosting](labs/lab-trees-random-forests-gradient-boosting.qmd) | Course 4, week 2, session 1 |
| C4.7 | [Week 2, Session 2 â€” Interpretability and SHAP](labs/lab-interpretability-and-shap.qmd) | Course 4, week 2, session 2 |
| C4.8 | [Week 2, Session 3 â€” Tabular neural networks with torch](labs/lab-tabular-neural-networks-with-torch.qmd) | Course 4, week 2, session 3 |
| C4.9 | [Week 2, Session 4 â€” Imaging and sequence models intro](labs/lab-imaging-and-sequence-models-intro.qmd) | Course 4, week 2, session 4 |
| C4.10 | [Week 2, Session 5 â€” tidymodels pipelines](labs/lab-tidymodels-pipelines.qmd) | Course 4, week 2, session 5 |
| C4.19 | [Week 4, Session 4 â€” FDR, knockoffs, replication crisis](labs/lab-fdr-knockoffs-replication-crisis.qmd) | Course 4, week 4, session 4 |
